product_name: Declassified Cases — Weekly Mystery Detective Experience
description: Digital detective mystery experiences. Each case includes classified files, clues, scenes, and a complete narrative to solve.
target_audience_hint: Americans aged 25-45 who enjoy true crime podcasts, escape rooms, mystery games, and date night activities. English-speaking, US-based.
allowed_claims: Play solo, as a couple, or in a group (1-6 players)
forbidden_claims: Do NOT fabricate testimonials, reviews, or customer quotes
Do NOT invent a satisfaction or refund guarantee
Do NOT claim exclusivity ('the only', 'the first') without evidence
Do NOT invent exact file counts unless sourced from the case_brief
Do NOT mention 'real police report' or 'real case' — these are fiction
Do NOT compare with competitors using fabricated data
Do NOT fabricate statistics ('97% of players', '5 stars')
Do NOT claim 'based on real events' unless the case explicitly says so
Do NOT invent awards or recognition
If social proof is needed, use placeholder [TESTIMONIAL] or [REVIEW]
